Kidplokio 3pc Space Toy Bundle Sword Blaster and Superhero Cinch Bag (2 Colors)

Fuel your child’s imagination with this exciting Kidplokio Space Adventure Bundle! Featuring a light-up Galaxy Sword, an action-packed Space Blaster, and a superhero-themed drawstring cinch bag, this 3-piece set makes an awesome holiday gift for kids who love space, action, and pretend play.

Light-Up Galaxy Sword

Key Features

  • 3PC SPACE ADVENTURE GIFT SET - Includes a light-up Galaxy Sword, sound-effect Space Blaster, and superhero drawstring cinch bag for imaginative play on the go.
  • LIGHT-UP SWORD WITH SOUNDS - Bright LED lights and exciting sound effects enhance pretend play and keep kids engaged for hours.
  • ACTION-PACKED SPACE BLASTER - Durable, lightweight blaster features fun sound effects and easy operation for active indoor or outdoor play.
  • DURABLE SUPERHERO CINGH BAG - Water-resistant 18" x 13" drawstring bag fits school supplies, sports gear, toys, and more with adjustable straps for comfort.
  • PERFECT GIFT FOR BOYS AGES 3+ - Encourages creative play, movement, and screen-free fun—great for holidays, birthdays, and everyday adventures.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPL2PCSS

Suit up for interstellar missions with the futuristic Galaxy Sword, designed with bright LED lights and thrilling sound effects that bring imaginative play to life. Lightweight and easy to grip, this sword keeps kids engaged for hours as they imagine space battles, rescue missions, and adventures across the galaxy.

Space Blaster Toy

Encourage active play with the Kidplokio Space Blaster - perfect for reducing screen time and getting kids moving. With cool sound effects and dynamic pretend-play features, young space explorers will love battling aliens or defending distant planets. The blaster is made from durable, lightweight plastic, making it easy for kids to operate during indoor or outdoor play.

Superhero Drawstring Cinch Bag

The included cinch bag measures 18" x 13" and is ideal for carrying school supplies, sports gear, toys, and more. Made from durable, water-resistant polyester, it features a secure drawstring closure and adjustable straps for a comfortable fit on most kids.

Bring the adventure home with this all-in-one space toy set - perfect for birthdays, holidays, and everyday imaginative fun!
